title: setenv rollback on SWTPM_SERVER_PORT failure ignores unsetenv error
description: In device.rs open_swtpm and connection.rs WolfTpmSwtpm::connect: when libc_setenv for SWTPM_SERVER_PORT fails, the rollback calls libc_unsetenv(SWTPM_SERVER_NAME) but discards its return value. If unsetenv itself fails (e.g. EINVAL on a corrupt env), SWTPM_SERVER_NAME is left set in the process environment. A subsequent call from another thread that acquires the lock will see a stale SWTPM_SERVER_NAME while SWTPM_SERVER_PORT is absent, potentially causing wolfTPM2_Init to connect to the wrong host.
